inputs.label: Field Goals Made
inputs.businessContext: Number of successful field goal attempts (2-point and 3-point baskets made).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of successful field goal attempts (2-point and 3-point baskets made).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Başarılı saha içi atış sayısı (2 sayılık ve 3 sayılık basketler).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de tentatives de panier réussies (paniers à 2 et 3 points marqués).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de intentos de tiro de campo exitosos (canastas de 2 y 3 puntos anotadas).

inputs.label: Field Goals Attempted
inputs.businessContext: Total number of field goal attempts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of field goal attempts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam saha içi atış denemesi sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de tentatives de panier.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de intentos de tiro de campo.

inputs.label: Three-Pointers Made
inputs.businessContext: Number of successful three-point field goal attempts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of successful three-point field goal attempts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de tentatives de trois-points réussies.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de intentos de triple exitosos.

inputs.label: Three-Pointers Attempted
inputs.businessContext: Total number of three-point field goal attempts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of three-point field goal attempts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam üç sayılık atış denemesi sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de tentatives de trois-points.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de intentos de triple.

inputs.label: Free Throws Made
inputs.businessContext: Number of successful free throw attempts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of successful free throw attempts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de tentatives de lancer franc réussies.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de intentos de tiro libre exitosos.

inputs.label: Free Throws Attempted
inputs.businessContext: Total number of free throw attempts.
